description_long: This is a stylized biplane with a compact fuselage and two sets of straight, parallel wings, each adorned with black Iron Cross insignias. The body is painted in a gradient of red and green, with a white nose cone and a shark mouth motif on the front lower fuselage. The cockpit is open and positioned near the front, featuring a visible pilot seat and a mounted machine gun. The propeller is wooden and mounted at the nose, while the tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer with matching insignias. The landing gear consists of two fixed wheels and a small tail skid, giving the aircraft a classic World War I-era appearance.
description: A compact, stylized biplane with red and green coloring, Iron Cross insignias, an open cockpit, and a wooden propeller.
description_view_0: Front-top view showing the dual wings, Iron Cross insignias, and the pointed nose with a shark mouth motif.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the fixed landing gear.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the wooden propeller, open cockpit, and the aggressive shark mouth design.
description_view_3: Opposite rear-side view emphasizing the tail, wing structure, and the side-mounted insignias.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two sets of straight, parallel, mid-mounted wings; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit with no canopy.
